nasb.text: But the breasts and the right thigh Aaron presented as a wave offering before the Lord, just as Moses had commanded.

esv.text: but the breasts and the right thigh Aaron waved for a wave offering before the Lord, as Moses commanded.

cnv.text: 至於胸和右後腿，亞倫拿來作搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖；都是照著摩西吩咐的。

ccb.text: 将胸肉和右腿肉作为摇祭在耶和华面前摇一摇，都遵照摩西的吩咐。
